description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
A banner, tiki torch, set of moose antlers on their heads, whatever - the various ridiculous iconography of neofacists. Gang tagging cannot be removed.

A sport rifle, for fun, not people. Can only load Small Game Ammunition and is incapable of Autofire and Suppressive Fire.

Has been upgraded with a much larger magazine and a bump stock to make it almost dangerous.
Small game ammo; not great for people. Deals 2d6 less damage.
The Overlord Handcannon is a Poor Quality Exotic Heavy Pistol with a ROF of 1. It may give a +1 bonus to Facedowns in certain situations. Full rules can be found in Black Chrome on Page 106.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 2/Troublemaker -The low-level gangoons and enforcers that fill Night City's streets, trying to make a name for themselves. Not especially threatening, but they outnumber every other threat in the city 10:1.

Gang-Wide Ability - Single-Minded: Each subsequent RCL member to take the same action in a round (I.E. shooting at the same target, lifting the same thing) receives +1 to their check when doing so.

Ability - Too Stupid To Care: Recruits cannot lose facedown checks.

The recruitment path for RCL is simple: first, you find idiots that are already angry and can't get laid - religious zealots, incels, nationalists and the idiots who dropped out in 6th grade. Then you get them to invest in whatever pyramid scheme you've got going that week. Once they've lost everything, you blame it on a random minority - gays, blacks, Chinese, women, anything will work. And bam! You've got an army of morons ready to die for your cause.
